name: Shamisen Samsara Sorrowcat
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>燐</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>廻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ね</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>三</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>弦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>け</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>猫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ねこ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
Once per Chain, during your opponent's Main Phase, you can (Quick Effect): Immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon using this card you control. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 other Synchro Monster in your GY; return it to the Extra Deck, and if you do, Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Shamisen Samsara Sorrowcat" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Uses itself as a Synchro Material
Returns from your Graveyard to your Extra Deck
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
